regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 escalation has reached an inflection point with US and Israeli forces conducting the largest coordinated airstrike campaign against Iran (13,000+ targets including Kharg Island, bridges, IRGC HQ, and nuclear facilities), while Trump's contradictory diplomatic posturing (5-day pause vs. final deadline threats) collides with Iranian denials of negotiations, hardline consolidation under Mojtaba Khamenei/Zolghadr, and growing internal political deadlock between President Pezeshkian and the IRGC.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US and Israeli forces destroyed over 13,000 targets across Iran on April 7-8, 2026, including Kharg Island oil infrastructure, eight strategic bridge segments, IRGC headquarters, and facilities near Bushehr nuclear plant, marking the most intensive phase of the 42-day escalation.
